final_response: Three items in followups.md are past their expected-by as of today: (1) SOC2 evidence from Karen at Acme Compliance — expected 2026-04-07, chased once on 2026-04-08, still no response, and your own note flags it as needed before the May auditor window, so this is the audit-window-blocking one; (2) Q2 budget review from Marcus in Finance — expected 2026-04-25, never chased; (3) Office wifi demo schedule from Nimbus — expected 2026-04-23, never chased. SOC2 first. Want me to draft the chase notes?

actions.summary: Created today's daybook with Intent and Log capturing the three overdue followups; Handoff left for end of session.

notes: User's question is the canonical cold-pickup trigger; AGENTS.md prescribes scanning followups.md as step 2 of 'As you work'.
All three followups are past their expected-by relative to today (2026-05-17). SOC2 is the only one with a substantive overdue-consequence note (audit window in May), so it leads the response.
No prior real daybook to consult — only the seeded 0000-00-00-example.md — so there is no Guardrails-for-next-session block that could change the framing.
Did not promote anything to decisions.md or observations.md: the scan is a routine triage, not a commitment or a cross-cutting pattern (yet).
Did not chase the items myself — the user asked what to chase, not for me to act. Offered to draft chase notes as the next step.
